name: Niyo

steps: Download the Niyo app from the Google Play Store or Apple App Store.
Open the app and start the registration process by entering your mobile number.
Verify your mobile number using the OTP sent to your device.
On the referral/promo code screen, enter the code HUSSA800 to qualify for the sign-up bonus.
Complete your digital KYC by providing your PAN and Aadhaar details.
Once your account is set up, load funds and order your physical Niyo card.
Receive your ₹250 in Niyo Coins as a joining bonus once your account is fully activated.

faq.question: What is the benefit of using the referral code HUSSA800?
faq.answer: By using the referral code HUSSA800 during sign-up, you will receive a welcome bonus of ₹250 in Niyo Coins once your account is successfully created and activated.

faq.question: Does Niyo really charge zero forex markup?
faq.answer: Yes, Niyo offers true zero forex markup on international transactions. You only pay the real-time VISA/Mastercard exchange rate without any additional conversion fees.

faq.question: Where can I use my Niyo card?
faq.answer: Your Niyo card is globally accepted in over 180 countries. You can use it for international ATMs, online shopping on foreign websites, and physical POS terminals abroad.

faq.question: How do I redeem my Niyo Coins?
faq.answer: Niyo Coins earned through referrals and milestones can be redeemed directly within the Niyo app for cashback, brand vouchers, or other exciting rewards available in the reward catalog.

detailed_review:
Why Niyo is the Ultimate Companion for International Travelers

For globetrotters, students studying abroad, and frequent business travelers, managing foreign exchange can be a costly affair. Traditional banks often levy heavy markup fees ranging from 2% to 5% on international transactions. This is where Niyo steps in as a game-changer. By offering a digital-first banking experience with zero forex markup, Niyo ensures that you pay only the real-time exchange rates when you spend globally.

Key Features That Make Niyo Stand Out

  • Zero Forex Markup: Spend anywhere in the world without worrying about hidden conversion fees.
  • Global Acceptance: Your Niyo card is accepted in over 180 countries, making it a truly global travel card.
  • Seamless Digital Onboarding: Skip the long bank queues. Niyo offers a 100% paperless, fully digital account setup that takes only a few minutes.
  • Real-time Tracking & Security: Lock, unlock, and manage your card limits instantly via the intuitive Niyo mobile app.

How to Claim Your ₹250 Joining Bonus

Getting started with Niyo is not only beneficial for your travel budget, but it also comes with an exclusive welcome reward. By signing up with the referral code HUSSA800, you will instantly grab ₹250 in Niyo Coins as a joining bonus. These coins can be easily redeemed within the app, giving you a head start on your savings before you even board your flight.

Maximize Your Rewards with Niyo

To get the most out of your Niyo account, make sure to complete your full video KYC immediately after signing up. This unlocks higher spending limits and ensures uninterrupted service during your international travels. Additionally, load your card via UPI or net banking before you fly so you can instantly spend in local currencies with absolutely zero markup fees.
